commentary_text: The model favors Uzbekistan at 46%, while the sportsbook consensus favors DR Congo at 44%. On the Uzbekistan win specifically, the gap is 17 percentage points—the model substantially higher. This divergence could reflect recent form, injuries, or lineup changes that the model has not yet incorporated, or conversely, information baked into real-money prices that the statistical forecast cannot access. The dashboard surfaces this disagreement as a signal worth monitoring, not as evidence that either source has misjudged the match.
